audit_items.proof_trace: All decrRefCount calls in t_list.c occur at the pointer's last use: post-call lines access only stack-allocated or separately-tracked variables. Iterator lifecycles are correctly paired (init→use→listTypeReleaseIterator) with no double-release, and quicklistDelEntry properly nulls iter->zi and updates iter->current on node deletion, making delete-during-iteration in lremCommand safe. Every dbDelete call occurs after the final dereference of the associated object pointer (o, sobj, or subject), with no subsequent use in any code path.
